reviews.comment:
Ni le puse 5 estrellas xq cuesta mucho salir con la fila en el semáforo justo al lado, pero si no todo está muy bien, la atención es muy buena y agradable y salís rápido de ahí, al menos de noche q siempre voy de noche

(Translated by Google)
I didn't even give it 5 stars because it's hard to get out with the line at the traffic light right next to it, but otherwise everything is great, the service is very good and pleasant and you get out of there quickly, at least at night, since I always go at night.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de Yesica en el área de registro de conducir internacional!!! Muy profesional!!! En la cafetería nos atendieron muy bien y con rapidez...muy agradable la encargada de la mañana!!! Los baños impecables!!! Recomendable para todos los que deseen un buen servicio!!! Gracias a todos!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from Yesica in the international driver's license registration area! Very professional! The cafeteria staff were very friendly and efficient...the morning manager was very pleasant! The restrooms were spotless! Highly recommended for anyone looking for great service! Thank you all!
